tool_args.label: Queens Bus Network Redesign
tool_args.raw_text: This month we will be releasing a new Queens Bus Network Redesign Draft Plan.

payload.description: Releasing a New Draft Plan for the Queens Bus Network Redesign in March 2022, based on over 11,000 comments received; virtual public workshops to be held spring and summer 2022

evidence_refs.source_quote: This month we will be releasing a new Queens Bus Network Redesign Draft Plan.

We received more than 11,000 comments about the previously proposed Draft Plan. The New Draft Plan is more robust as a result of this extensive feedback. To be clear, this is a New Draft Plan—not the Final Plan. This spring and summer, the MTA will be holding several virtual public workshops

issues: evidence_refs[1].source_quote must be 280 characters or fewer

tool_args.label: OMNY Fare Capping Pilot (Lucky 13)
tool_args.raw_text: Subways was eager to help roll out an OMNY fare capping pilot this month.

payload.description: OMNY fare capping pilot launched in March 2022. After 12 OMNY trips in a calendar week with the same device, rides are free for the rest of the week (Lucky 13). Benefitted 76,000 customers in first two weeks.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Subways was eager to help roll out an OMNY fare capping pilot this month.
OMNY fare-capping pilot, which benefitted 76,000 customers in its first two weeks.
